What's up guys, Joey here. So now that you have the entire system built out and ready to go, it's time to activate it. So we are going to be in the next few videos talking about how to fulfill on this challenge. We'll start off by texting your old members that you want to reactivate, emailing them, calling them, we'll have all of the scripts, we'll have all of the information that you're going to need to get them scheduled and get them in your challenge. After that, we are going to be going over how to run the nutrition orientation. So you are able to sell them supplements, get them fired up, get there before pictures, and just really over deliver with them coming back into your gym for the first time in a while. Then finally, we will go over how to fulfill the entire 21 days, how we're going to be reaching out to them, how we're going to over deliver in value, and most importantly, on the back end, how we are going to be converting them over to an EFT and then remodeling and reselling them. Let's get into it.
